role: Pipeline stage tasks for the ArchSpine mirror system that implement a sequence of processing stages from source discovery to artifact generation.
responsibility: This directory contains all pipeline stage tasks that collectively orchestrate the ArchSpine mirror system: scanning and reconciling files, extracting ASTs and language metadata, performing semantic summarization and validation, applying LLM-based fixes, building dependency graphs and knowledge graphs, constructing reverse indexes, generating aggregated content units, committing state to the database, deriving view artifacts, and orchestrating post-commit steps. Each file implements a specific StageTask contract and manages its own execution checkpointing for resumability.

children.role: Pipeline stage task responsible for aggregating source files into directory-level and project-level content units, with support for resuming interrupted aggregations.
Pipeline stage task responsible for AST extraction, language detection, and symbol registration for source files identified during the scan phase.
Pipeline stage that applies LLM-generated patches to automatically fix architectural rule violations in source files.

Pipeline stage task that constructs a knowledge graph from the module dependency graph, runs structural diagnostics (cycle detection, dead code detection, hub detection), and persists views (JSON outputs) and health flags for downstream inspection.

Pipeline orchestration task that executes the post-commit derivation stage of the ArchSpine mirror system. It composes sub-tasks for reverse indexing, aggregation, knowledge graph generation, and view derivation, then writes the control plane README and final artifacts.
Pipeline task module that reconciles the internal manifest state and file cache with the filesystem, ensuring language indices and file metadata are consistent.
Pipeline stage module that constructs the reverse dependency index (dependency→dependents mapping) from index documents of tracked files.
Pipeline task responsible for scanning orphan files (files tracked by the manifest but no longer present in the scanner's file set) and cleaning up their state from the project's knowledge base.
Pipeline task for committing synchronized file state to SQLite after AST extraction and LLM summarization. Extends SpineTask to enforce stage-local execution within the ArchSpine pipeline.
Pipeline task module orchestrating the LLM-based summarization and synthesis stage, consuming extraction artifacts and producing structured semantic summaries.
Pipeline stage task for semantic architecture validation of source files against project rules.
Pipeline task for orchestrating view artifact derivation after the commit stage.
